title: Clay Overhaul
description: Add new uses to Minecraft clay!
body:
![Mod Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/48167123375086370179df78da8fceedc9e3bcce.png)

# 📖 About
This mod adds a lot of blocks and items crafted with clay, new clay type, new villager profession and new structures!
